base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of spell_heal_blue — a effect_layer (spell_vfx) from 1986 dragon quest. 5-frame blue orb. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame blue orb → sparkle-ring; Heal / Healmore (Gira spell) visual
